waiver.title: Gym Usage Authorization
waiver.rule_1: Use of these facilities is only permitted for persons over the age of 16.
waiver.rule_2: All persons using the equipment do so at their own risk.
waiver.rule_3: Advance booking of these facilities is not permitted.
waiver.rule_4: For your own SAFETY, we have 24-hour video surveillance. Recordings will be deleted after 24 hours.
waiver.rule_5: Please set your mobile devices to 'SILENT' mode at the entrance.
waiver.rule_6: It is ESSENTIAL to wear appropriate footwear and clothing at all times.
waiver.rule_7: As a fundamental HYGIENE RULE, it is mandatory to use a towel to sit and/or lie down on when using the equipment.
waiver.rule_8: Towels are available for purchase at reception.
waiver.rule_9: Please respect the time restrictions on cardiovascular exercise machines.
waiver.rule_10: Please PLACE weights in their compartments; do not throw or hit them.
waiver.rule_11: Eating is PROHIBITED in this area. Drinks consumed during training must be properly sealed.
waiver.rule_12: Report any faults or problems immediately to reception.
waiver.accept_rules: I have read and accept the gym rules
waiver.age_error: You must be at least 18 years old to use the gym
waiver.must_accept: You must accept the gym rules

thankyou.title: Thank you!
thankyou.subtitle: Your authorization has been registered successfully
